final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial illustration of a vintage American road-trip scene.

Style/medium: needs a "复古美式" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1950s American roadside diner culture, Route 66 postcard illustration tradition, mid-century travel poster design; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a red convertible car as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: must include Route 66 highway, desert landscape, and cacti on both sides
Lighting/mood: needs a sunset atmosphere with free-spirited energy — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be orange-red dominant sky direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
